scores.justification: Body unchanged from converged v3: definitions -> kernel-checked theorems -> historically loaded corollary. Theorem 5.3's anchor horn_valuation_realizable_iff re-verified at proofs/TractatusOntologyHorn.lean:167 with the Lean statement exactly the printed per-valuation boundary; #print axioms clean. No artifact-unbacked theorem statement found.

64 declarations / 1,064 lines re-verified exactly (37+9+6+12; wc -l 472+212+145+235); the external artifact was RUN via the 0.8.0 artifact_verify gate — lake build exit 0, 3068 jobs, exactly the 9 documented #eval info lines — and git diff 0852c5b master -- proofs/ is empty, so the result transfers to the pinned commit verbatim.
Contributions enumerated (C1)-(C5), one extractable sentence each; central separation result crisp in the abstract. Unchanged by the v4 polish.

Button, Moss, Armstrong/Skyrms, Evans-Berger, McKinsey/Horn, Benzmueller engaged on their merits; Lokhorst and Weiss positioned as closest precedents; Spinney 2022 (Synthese venue precedent) engaged in the §4 footnote. 17/17 bib entries cited; no known close prior work missing. No litsearch sibling (legacy baseline, no deduction).

v3 deduction closed: commit 0852c5b pinned in §1, full 40-char hash in Appendix A, and bib note; verified this pass as an ancestor of master with proofs/, lakefile.lean, lean-toolchain, lake-manifest.json byte-identical since — so the artifact gate's clean lake build at HEAD confirms the 'warning-free at that commit' claim. Toolchain pinned, per-theorem index complete, repo public.

v3 caption nit fixed with the suggested unambiguous phrasing ('realizes exactly the image profiles of'), matching Theorem 6.5's profile-set-equality content; figure re-inspected in the compiled PDF (legible, black-only); Appendix booktabs index clean.
scores.evidence_span: main.tex Figure 1 caption; figures/spectrum.pdf; Appendix A

scores.justification: Flow intact; v4 stray-space fix landed; render gate PASS on the audit-built PDF (10 pages, 0 overfull boxes, 0 placeholders), 0 errors, 0 undefined references. Two mild underfull hboxes (badness <= 2237) are cosmetic.

17/17 keys resolve with complete fields (cited set == bib set; bibtex 0 errors/warnings); the last known-wrong entry (invented companion title) is fixed and verified in-repo against tractatus-ontology.9/paper.tex:139-140; no invented locators.
Ten pages, every section load-bearing, hedging proportional to the Limitations actually conceded; contribution extractable from abstract + (C1)-(C5) in under 90 seconds.

findings.evidence_span: BRIEF.md frontmatter (venue: Synthese, anonymous: false); main.tex §1 artifact paragraph
findings.rationale: Submission mechanics, not paper content: Synthese review is double-anonymous by default and the body identifies the author (repo URL, self-citation). Known, deliberately-open item on issue #5; not scored against the paper.
findings.suggested_fix: Prepare the anonymized submission variant per Synthese author guidelines at submission time.

findings.rationale: Two mildly underfull hboxes (badness 1831 and 2237). Cosmetic interword spacing only; the final pass is otherwise warning-free.
findings.suggested_fix: Ignore unless a later revision touches those paragraphs anyway.

findings.evidence_span: refs.bib companion2026; v4 changelog (author decision on record)
findings.rationale: The companion paper may retitle at its v10 pass, which would silently re-break the now-correct companion2026 title.
findings.suggested_fix: Re-sync the companion title at submission time if the retitle lands.
